title: Test PRD
text:
CartRank Playbook
📌 CartRank tracks your brand's visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and 
Gemini.
But tracking is only useful if you know what to do with the data.
This guide breaks down each feature and shows you how to get the most 
out of it. 
What to look at, what it means, and what action to take.
Access The Tool here: 
h t t p s : / / c a r t r a n k . a i
1. Complete the onboarding
2/9/26, 2:58 PM CartRank Playbook
https://impartial-money-fa9.notion.site/CartRank-Playbook-2fb9112c6a1f801baea0d8a09526ddb7 1/7

CartRank will:
- Pull all the information it needs about your store
- Find competitors
- Identify the most relevant prompts to track your AI visibility
2/9/26, 2:58 PM CartRank Playbook
https://impartial-money-fa9.notion.site/CartRank-Playbook-2fb9112c6a1f801baea0d8a09526ddb7 2/7

2. Dashboard
Once youʼve finished your onboarding and youʼre in the Dashboard, click on 
“Track Visibility”.
Our proprietary algorithm will do a deep dive and find detailed tracking results 
across different AI Platforms.
2/9/26, 2:58 PM CartRank Playbook
https://impartial-money-fa9.notion.site/CartRank-Playbook-2fb9112c6a1f801baea0d8a09526ddb7 3/7

The results:
3. Visibility
Go to the “Visibility” feature to find your:
- Platform performance
- Share of Voice (compared with competitors)
2/9/26, 2:58 PM CartRank Playbook
https://impartial-money-fa9.notion.site/CartRank-Playbook-2fb9112c6a1f801baea0d8a09526ddb7 4/7

- Industry Ranking (# of mentions + avg. position)
- Cited sources
4. Mentions
Go to the “Mentions” feature to find:
-  What prompts youʼre ranking for
- Average position
- Cited Sources for that prompt
2/9/26, 2:58 PM CartRank Playbook
https://impartial-money-fa9.notion.site/CartRank-Playbook-2fb9112c6a1f801baea0d8a09526ddb7 5/7

5. Mentions
Go to the “Competitors” feature to find which ones of your competitors is ranking 
the highest in AI search so you can reverse engineer their strategy.
6. Sources
Find out how many citations and mentions youʼre getting from each source.
This will help you identify the best websites to keep on getting mentioned.
6. Opportunities
CartRank will identify and suggest recommendations on what you can do to 
improve your AI Visibility. (i.e. Write a Buying Guide.)
2/9/26, 2:58 PM CartRank Playbook
https://impartial-money-fa9.notion.site/CartRank-Playbook-2fb9112c6a1f801baea0d8a09526ddb7 6/7

7. AEO Audit
You can run audits on your product page, collection pages or landing pages to 
audit for GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). This will give you a detailed 
2/9/26, 2:58 PM CartRank Playbook
https://impartial-money-fa9.notion.site/CartRank-Playbook-2fb9112c6a1f801baea0d8a09526ddb7 7/7
